titleStmt.title: SII 9.525: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 525. (A.R. No. 411 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE OUTER PRAKARA OF THE TEMPLE OF MAHALIN-GESVARA AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1451, Sarvadhāri, Kārtika, śu. 1, corresponding to A.D. 1528 October 14, Wednesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records that, while Aḷiya Timmaṇṇa-Voḍeya was ruling over Bārakūra-rājya under the king's orders, Śaṅkaraseṭṭi, son of Sōvaṇaseṭṭi, built a maṭha and that Mallapaseṭṭi, son of Saṅkaraseṭṭi's first wife, and Saṅkamanāyakiti, Saṅkaraseṭṭi's second wife, and her sister, Dēku Aḍeyiti, endowed the maṭha with some plots of land for its maintenance.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīgaṇādhipataEṁ namaḥ . śrīsarasvatyeEṁ namaḥ śrīgurubhyō(ṁ)namaḥ nirvvighnamastu . namastuṁgaśi
raścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhē mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1450
saṁdu Ayivattavoṁdaneya sarvadhārisaṁvachsarada kārtika śu 1 lū śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa kru
ṣṇarāyamahārāyarū vijayanagariya siṁhāsanadalū sakala sāṁbrājyavanu pratipālisutiha kāladalli Avara nirūpa
diṁda Aragada Aḷiya timmaṁṇavoḍeyarū bārakūra rājyavanū Āḷuvali basaṟūra paḍukēryya nakharēśvarada śrīmahāliṁgadēvara badakaṭṭi
nalli sōvaṇaseṭṭiya maga saṁkaraseṭṭiyū maṭhavanū kaṭṭisi māḍida dharmake Ātana saṁtānadavaru mūvaru tāyamakkaḷo
ḷage hiriya tāya maga malpaseṭṭi biṭṭa sarvvasvada vivara māṇikoḷala hadahinoḷage hūliya Aṁṇappahebbā
rana makkaḷu �yośvarahebbāra mādappahebbāranavara mūlada bāḷa catusīmeya vivara baḍaga lu Arevosēriya gadeya
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu mūḍalu tolādhāriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu hūliya kaḷame keyana gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu paḍu
valu harida sāliṁda mūḍalu yī nālku catussīmeya voḷage beḷugaleṁba gadde nāgaṁḍugadalu mu 5 baya
lagade yidaṟa kūḍaṇa mekke hūliya makkaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu gadde 2 kaṁ muḍi 2 �yo mekkeya teṁkaṇa teṁgina tō
ṭade catussīmeya vivara baḍagalu Aṁṇappahebbāruvana hoyimaṁṇa mekkeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu mūḍalu hū
liya makkaḷa mūlada tōṭada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu tolādhāriya hālagadeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuva
lu Aṁṇapahebārana tōṭada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍalu yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷagaṇa teṁgina tōṭa
bayalu mekke saha nāghaṁḍugada ba . mu 7 yī sarvvasvavanu biḍāruvāravāgi cikadaṁṇaṁdaru bārakūra parivartana
ke saluva doḍa va ga 81 mata kuṭige tekoṁḍa va ga 5 hodekaṭige tekoṁḍa va ga 5 mulādige va ga 10 mayisāla va ga 10 Aṁtu
Aruvara kuḍuhoḍe kaṭu mūlādi mayisāla vanige
tegedukoṁḍaru haṁnoṁdu varahananu saṁkaraseṭiya teṁma mallapaseṭṭi koṭanu
hebāra tegedukūṁḍanu �yo bāḷa kuḍaṇa tōṭadali teṁginasasiya naṭadake geṁḍege
voṁdu hoṁnina maryādeyali Āruvārada Ārthava koḍuvāga koṭṭu baharu �yo bāḷige yeḷaura Aṁṇuse
ṭiya hadibayala gaddege mukkālu vosari mekeya gade mu 2 ke bēpaḷeya hadi kālu vosari teṟu Ubhaya
voṁdosari teṟa tettu bāḷuvaru tōṭake hadihārana hadikaṭṭu teṟu nālku haṇa �yo patrakāra hoṇe Eḷa
Ura Aṁṇuseṭṭi sākṣigaḷu tiṭiya śaṁkharanārāyaṇa hebāra saṁṇaṁṇa bhaṭakartara vopa huliya
bhaṁgāru hoṇegāṟana vopa maṁḍekaṭṭina braṁmaru sākṣi doregaḷa vopa yiṁtivarubhayānmatadiṁ Avaḷa
ttiya vāmana nārāyaṇabhaṭṭara baraha mataṁ mallapaseṭṭiya kiriyatāyi saṁkaṁmanāyakiti Ākeya taṁgi dēku
Aḍeyati yī yibbaraṁ taṁma pālige baṁda dhar(ṁ)make biṭṭa bāḷu hāranāḍa voḷagaṇa haḍahu hareyaṁgōḍu U
ppina kuduru �yo yeraḍu gaḍi yelaṁ pōtarasara maga śankaradēvana mūla talākaheggaḍitiya Ārūvāra Ā talākahega
ḍitiya makaḷa kayyali nāu Aṁtarārūvāra māḍikoṁḍa bāḷa catusīmeya vivara mū ḍalu sōmayājiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
teṁkalu kaṭiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu siṁgēriya voḍeyara kaḷiya kaṭṭiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍa galu hareyaṁgōḍa kaḷakaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁ
tī catusīmeyiṁda voḷagaṇa śankaradēvana kaḷiyavoḷage bayalu muḍi 12 yidaṟa kūḍaṇa beṭṭu mu 18 Ubhaya mu 30 gadeya
voḷage kōṭyappa haḍavāḷage mūṟoṁdu bhāgige baṁda hattu mūḍe gadeya mēlaṇa ga 60 varahananū kaḷadu naṁma yibbara pālu gade mu
ḍi 20 ṟa mēle koṭṭa Ardha bārakūra parivartanakke saluva doḍa varaha ga 120 Akṣāradalū nūṟayipatu doḍavaraha �yo bāḷige
teṟu sabhāyitana harikōṭeya kēriya nāruseṭige kāla 1 ke naḍasuva hareya bhatta mu 1 . ya kaḷaci naḍava gēṇi nāghaṁḍugadalū A
ki mu 24 �yo patrake Āda hoṇe kōṭeya kēriya nāruseṭṭi sākṣigaḷu jaṁni Āṁṇamēlāḍi hebbārubhaṁḍāri siṁgēriya voḍe
yara manuṣya rāmasēvabōva kalamaḷāḍiya madhyasta nārāyaṇabhaṭṭara baraha mattaṁ Anegaḷiya kēśava mūḍakere
ya mūla manjanapāṭiṁ baḍagaṇa ya vaḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁ teṁkkalu kuṁbaḷa saṁkara mūḍakereyakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁ paḍavalu mēlāḍi
seṭiya gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu yakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu �yo nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage me mu 1 ko 10 mattaṁ bhānapana gaḍi
yiṁdaṁ paḍuva kōṭihebārana gaḍiyiṁda mūḍalu kōṭiṁbagada hā 30 mattaṁ hiribāḷa
makaḷa gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu mūḍalu kallagade Eṁbudu mu 1 mattaṁ hiriya bāḷa makaḷa gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu harida sā
liṁda mūḍalu mattaṁ hiribāḷa makaḷa gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu nāraṇadēvana gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu kaṭaṇahāḷi hā
10 mattaṁ kōṭi kaṁḍavara gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalū kereya kaḷagaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu mūḍaṇa hitilahāḷi mu hā 10 mattaṁ kōṭi kaṁḍavara
gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu paḍuvalu mūḍaṇa gaḍiya hāḷi hā 10 Aṁttu bittuva me mu 4 gadeyanū dēkuseṭiti
biḍāruvāravāgi māḍikoṁḍu koṭa doḍavaraha kunduvoḍekaṭige koṭa ga 3 �yo bāḷige teṟu kāṭi kaṁdahabārana ha
di vosari = heraḷihebārana hadi vosari .—sabācana hadi vosari = Aṁtu vosari . —�yo kaṭina hoṇe heraḷiya kēśahebāra sākṣi
gaḷu Aṁṇahebārana maga gōviṁdahebāra kāhāṭiya śaṁkharahebāra madhyasta śrīdharabhaṭana baraha

śrīgaṇādhipataĒṁ nama . mata mahāliṁgadēvarige naṁdādīptigū purāṇada dīpti
gū saṁkarahegaḍeya Āḷiya mallappaseṭi māḍida dharma taṁma mūlada teṁgina tōṭa
da catusīme mūḍalu naḍuvaccara baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu halara gaḍiyali baḍagalu paḍuvalu
Āriya baḷiya sopaseṭiya gaḍiyiṁ
varā
vāgi naḍasuvaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.525 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
